records.ety: [L. demonstratus, p. p. of demonstrare to demonstrate; de- + monstrare to show. See Monster.]

defs: To point out; to show; to exhibit; to make evident.
To show, or make evident, by reasoning or proof; to prove by deduction; to establish so as to exclude the possibility of doubt or denial.
quotes: We can not demonstrate these things so as to show that the contrary often involves a contradiction.

defs: To exhibit and explain (a dissection or other anatomical preparation).
